ocr_findings.description: Header banner '3しが出る！' in OCR line 1; image shows 'コレが出る！' as part of the decorative banner. The stylized 'コレ' glyph was misread as '3し'.
Answer line at bottom '問題13-1 エ　問題13-2 イ　問題13-3 ア　問題13-4 ウ' is present in OCR (last line) and matches image. No loss.

reviewer_notes: Exam page with 4 past questions (問題13-1 through 13-4) in ア/イ/ウ/エ format. All question text, choice text, table for 問題13-4, and answer key line are correctly captured. The decorative banner text misread is a recurring cosmetic issue. Answer letters are preserved. Label correctly identified as exam.
